prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约1590→3720→6565→5370→4025，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约305名；2025年基准约4025名，较2024年回升约1345名， 显示报考热度有所回暖；本省理科计划2021–2023年均为36人，2024年34人，2025年（物理类）27人；2026年计划30人，较2025年扩招3人（+11.1%），扩 招幅度较大，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第42名，近年排名稳定在44–46名区间，属于全国顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面，主要因新闻传播学类专业位次大幅下滑；抖音热度排名第97（一般），综合热度151588；2026年声誉数据中未见中央财经大学相关负面事件，舆情整体 平稳；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，均为财经类核心学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024 年评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温；本省2026年普通高考总人数约154000，较2025年（约116360）大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算约110800，竞争 显著加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约1.5%–2.5%，属正常外省 招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招11.1%及本省考生总数大幅增加约32%，考生增幅远超扩招幅度，竞争加剧为主导因素；在2025年基准40 25名基础上，预计最低位次小幅前移（更难进），预测最低位次约4243名，区间3743–4743名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学类（含金融工程、金融科技）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 税收学（北理工智能、税收联培）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融学（含金融学、北外英语联培）
- 经济学（数理经济与数理金融）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估等）
- 精算学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 投资学（含投资学、大数据双学位）
- 经济与贸易类（含国际经济与贸易、国际商务等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3743–4743名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（<3743名）可重点冲击金融学类、会计学院等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>4743名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档冷门方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 1590 → 3720 → 6565 → 5370 → 4025, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 305 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4025, an increase of about 1345 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity; the provincial science enrollment plan was 36 people each year from 2021 to 2023, 34 in 2024, and 27 in 2025 (physics category); the 2026 plan is 30 people, an increase of 3 people (+11.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking in the 44–46 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the ranking of journalism and communication majors; Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of 151,588; no negative events related to Central University of Finance and Economics were found in the 2026 reputation data, and public opinion is generally stable; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics is rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching the enrollment majors, and strongly attractive for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics majors were assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see' in 2024, slightly warming up compared to 2023; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 116,360), with physics category candidates estimated at about 110,800, significantly intensifying competition; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2.5%, which is a normal out-of-province enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the 11.1% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion, making intensified competition the dominant factor; based on the 2025 baseline of 4025, the lowest ranking is expected to move slightly forward (harder to enter), with a predicted lowest ranking of about 4243, and a range of 3743–4743.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Finance (including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Taxation (Beijing Institute of Technology Smart Taxation Joint Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance (including Finance, Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance)
- Public Finance (including Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation, etc.)
- Actuarial Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Talent Class)
- Investment (including Investment, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, International Business, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3743–4743, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<3743), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Finance and Accounting School; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4743), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering less popular directions in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) fluctuated significantly: approximately 1041 → 968 → 1162 → 2142 → 370. The 2025 ranking of 370 is the best (most difficult to enter) in the past five years, moving up 1772 places compared to 2024, indicating a sharp rise in application popularity. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 13 students in both 2021 and 2022, 14 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 18 in 2025 (history category). The 2026 plan is 19 students, an increase of 1 student (+5.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the ranking of journalism and communication majors. Douyin popularity ranking: 97th (average), comprehensive popularity: 151588. No negative incidents related to Central University of Finance and Economics were found in the 2026 reputation data, with overall public sentiment stable. Applied Economics rated A, Theoretical Economics rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching the liberal arts enrollment majors, and strongly attractive for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/finance and economics/economics majors were assessed as "differentiated wait-and-see" in 2024 (heat_index=65.49), slightly warming compared to 2023. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with an estimated 43,200 history category examinees, indicating sharply intensified competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Inner Mongolia examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2.5%, a normal out-of-province enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is already at the best historical level (370th), the 2026 enrollment plan has a small expansion of 5.6%, and the total number of history category examinees in the province has increased significantly by about 32%, the increase in examinees far exceeds the expansion rate, further intensifying competition. Based on the 2025 benchmark of 370th place, the minimum ranking is expected to continue moving up slightly (more difficult to enter), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 352nd, and a range of 299–405.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance and Taxation (including Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation, etc.)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Finance
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (Smart Economy) (including Economics, National Economic Management)
- Law (including dual degrees with Accounting, dual degrees with Business Administration, etc.)
- Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, International Business, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business School) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Public Administration (including Administrative Management, Urban Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 299–405, competition is extremely intense. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<299), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Finance and Taxation and the Accounting School. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>405), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors and choose cautiously.
